function.name: is_prach_subframe
function.signature: int is_prach_subframe(LTE_DL_FRAME_PARMS *frame_parms, uint32_t frame, uint8_t subframe)

bug.description: use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed

prompt:
There is a use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed downstream of function is_prach_subframe in the openair1/PHY/LTE_TRANSPORT subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/LTE_TRANSPORT/prach_common.c:359.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
